payload.title: Real LSP: hover, diagnostics, go-to-def
payload.description: Replace the 6-line stub in rustricted-lsp with a real tower-lsp server. MVP: (1) textDocument/publishDiagnostics from lint_strict on save, (2) hover on named-arg call sites shows parameter name, (3) go-to-def for local fns. Use the same lower+lint pipeline as the CLI.
